summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Invite System feature. All 12 backend API tests passed. All 17 frontend UI tests passed. The invite-only registration system is fully functional.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register without invite_token returns 422 (missing field)
POST /api/auth/register with invalid invite_token returns 403
GET /api/invites/validate/{token} with invalid token returns 404
POST /api/invites/create requires authentication (401 without auth)
POST /api/invites/create creates a new invite token (authenticated)
GET /api/invites/validate/{token} validates active tokens correctly
GET /api/invites/my-invites requires authentication
GET /api/invites/my-invites returns list of user's invites
Full flow: create invite -> validate -> register -> invite marked used
Used invite cannot be reused for registration (returns 403)
GET /api/invites/my-invites shows used status and used_by_name
Login endpoint works with valid credentials
Frontend: /register without invite token shows 'Invite Required' gate page
Frontend: /register?invite=INVALID_TOKEN shows 'Invalid Invite' error page
Frontend: /register?invite=VALID_TOKEN shows signup form with 'invited by' banner
Frontend: Login page does NOT have direct link to /register
Frontend: Login page shows 'invite-only' message
Frontend: Login page mentions asking existing member for invite
Frontend: Login form is present with all required fields
Frontend: Logged-in user can navigate to 'Invite Members' panel in sidebar
Frontend: Invite panel is displayed with correct layout
Frontend: 'Generate Invite Link' button is present and functional
Frontend: New invite created when clicking Generate button
Frontend: Copy Link buttons present for active invites
Frontend: ACTIVE status badges displayed correctly
Frontend: USED status badges displayed correctly
Frontend: Used invites show 'Joined:' with user name who used the invite
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test invites and test users during testing. Test users prefixed with 'TEST_' for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invite system fully implemented and tested. Backend has 3 invite endpoints: POST /api/invites/create (authenticated), GET /api/invites/validate/{token} (public), GET /api/invites/my-invites (authenticated). Registration endpoint POST /api/auth/register now requires invite_token field. Frontend Register.js has InviteGate component that blocks access without valid invite. Login.js removed 'Join Now' link and shows invite-only message. InvitePanel.js allows logged-in users to generate invites, copy links, and see invite status (ACTIVE/USED/EXPIRED). Sidebar.js has 'Invite Members' nav item. Note: Clipboard copy may fail in headless browser testing due to browser security restrictions - this is expected behavior, not a bug.

Backend API.POST /api/auth/register: Requires invite_token, marks invite as used

Frontend Components.Register with valid invite: Shows signup form with 'invited by' banner
Frontend Components.Login page: No register link, shows invite-only message
Frontend Components.Invite Members nav: Present in sidebar for logged-in users
Frontend Components.InvitePanel: Generate button, invite list, ACTIVE/USED badges, Copy Link, Joined names
